crime.value: Murder by blunt force trauma in apartment; question: which of three suspects killed Julia?
crime.quote: she had been hit with something very heavy because there was blood everywhere

victim.value: Julia, a painter who discovered her friend's betrayal and was having an affair
victim.quote: She is a bastard. I couldn't believe it when I heard it the first time

closed_world.value: Julia's second flat with limited access - three known suspects with different entry methods
closed_world.quote: Julia's brother climbed through the window into the flat

culprit_and_motive.value: Tom (the husband) killed Julia after she revealed her affair, losing control of his temper
culprit_and_motive.quote: When Julia told him last night that she had an affair with Tom's attractive best friend, he lost control

resolution.value: Logical deduction eliminates other suspects through evidence analysis - fingerprints and circumstances
resolution.quote: Linda can't have killed Julia because she is allergic to orange juice

investigator.value: Police officer conducting the investigation with input from the husband Tom
investigator.quote: What do you think has happened here?' asked Tom the police officer

suspect_architecture.value: Three suspects with distinct motives: Linda (betrayal/ripping off), Julia's brother (drug addiction/money), Tom (hidden motive revealed as affair)
suspect_architecture.quote: Linda ripped off Julia... Julia's brother because he is a drug addict... Tom would be a good actor

red_herring.value: Orange juice allergy eliminates Linda as suspect; drug bag implicates brother but purse still full of money contradicts robbery
red_herring.quote: Linda can't have killed Julia because she is allergic to orange juice... why is the purse not empty?

clue_fairness.value: All key clues presented to reader: fingerprints on cup, spilled orange juice, open window, drug bag, full purse, Linda's allergy
clue_fairness.quote: There are fingerprints on it... somebody had spilt some orange juice... she is allergic to orange juice

social_world.value: Domestic relationships and dependencies: marriage, friendship betrayal, sibling financial dependence, drug addiction hierarchy
social_world.quote: Julia's best friend Linda... He often comes to borrow money from my wife

alibi.value: Tom's implicit alibi of being away while Julia painted all night, but he's revealed as the actual murderer present at scene
alibi.quote: Tom was on his way to the flat to see his wife because she wanted to paint all night long

reveal_mechanic.value: Process of elimination through physical evidence: allergy rules out Linda, full purse rules out brother, leaving Tom as killer
reveal_mechanic.quote: So Linda can't have killed Julia... why is the purse not empty? So who is the murderer?

_meta.title: ebook mysterious 6 who 039 s the murderer
